content.en:
Territory of the Four Thousand.

A newborn extradimensional realm.

The Lord of the Extinction Realm was out of the customs, and he was filled with emotion when he saw this Terran everywhere.

When the multidimensional catastrophe of death came, he found a special place, where even the sixth realm could not perceive, where he cultivated and broke through to the fifth realm, and also comprehended the rules of the dimension, plus there was a clone to stay in the outside world to learn information.

Unexpectedly, after the Death Multidimensional Tribulation came out, the Terrans quickly occupied all the extra-dimensional territories, and the population multiplied too fast, coupled with the strong strength, thousands of extra-dimensional territories changed one by one.

Today, it has become the territory of the Terrans.

"It's time to get out of here and enter the Upper Domain!"

The Lord of the Extinction Realm secretly said.

He obtains the Inheritance of the Upper Realm and a treasure that can be accessed directly into the Upper Domain, but can only be used once and cannot be returned.

Once he reaches the Upper Realm, there is hope that he will ascend to the Sixth Realm.

Wow!

The figure of the Lord of the Extinction Realm vanished and left the place.

......

Hundreds of millions of extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this time, the human race has become a real giant force among the thousands of extra-dimensional realms, and the number of the fifth realm has been cultivated to dozens, among which Ye Xingchen has quickly improved his cultivation to the peak realm of the fifth realm among the many resources provided by Ye Tian, and has also comprehended the rules of the triple dimension.

In addition, he created a large number of Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, and even used it countless times to let him comprehend, as well as countless times of guidance, and finally let Ye Xingchen comprehend an ordinary Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning.

At this point, Ye Xingchen's strength is also the top existence in the fifth realm.

However, compared with Ye Tian, the gap is still too big.

If Ye Tian hadn't wanted to break through in the most perfect way, he would have already reached the sixth realm.

this day.

Ripples appeared in the crystal barrier of the Four Thousand Territory, and figures walked out of it.

They were the fifth and fourth realms of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palaces such as the Lord of the Earthquake Sea Realm.

"The Death Multidimensional Tribulation has passed, hahaha, the elite of our Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace has not been lost, and now that it has come out, we will soon be able to establish a new Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace, which is still the most powerful force in the Four Thousand Territory!"

The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord said excitedly.

The other Fifth and Fourth Realms were also very excited.

In these billions of extradimensional eras, their strength has also increased a little, but they have been nesting there, and they can't give birth to descendants, which makes them very bored, and now that they have come out, they are naturally very excited.

Immediately, they flew to the former site of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace.

They were also able to guess that the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace should be gone, but as long as the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace was rebuilt, it would be fine.

Whoa!!!

They kept shuttling and forth, and soon came to the former site of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace.

Then.

They found that the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace had changed, and even the extra-dimensional realm where the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace was located had been changed, and this was already another new extra-dimensional realm.

"There is no existence of the fifth realm in this extra-dimensional realm, so occupy this extra-dimensional realm first. "

The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord ordered.

After occupying this extradimensional realm, they will inquire about the news and understand the situation.

Rumble!!!!!

The Fifth Realm and a large number of Fourth Realms poured into this extradimensional realm, and this scene also attracted the attention of a large number of Terran powerhouses in the extradimensional realm.

"This extra-dimensional realm, we want it in the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace!"

The voice of the Lord of the Earthquake Sea Realm spread throughout the entire extradimensional realm.

Whoa!!

A celebrity's fourth realm appeared, came to the Zhenhai Realm Lord, and said, "Senior, this place already belongs to our human race!"

"What kind of small clan is the human race, and they dare to occupy the former site of our Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace?"

The Lord of the Earthquake Sea Realm said coldly.

Is the Terran a small race?

These human race's fourth realm extradimensional realm is stunned, their human race has occupied all the extradimensional territory, those so-called extradimensional biological races, a small number of overlord-level superdimensional forces are looking at the face of the human race, who dares to have an opinion?

As a result, what kind of ten-dimensional heavenly palace dares to provoke the human race, is this looking for death?

They didn't dare to say it directly, after all, what was in front of them was the fifth realm, and they were only the fourth realm, and the other party could kill them with a blow.

However, they have already reported the information here, and the Fifth Realm will come and deal with it.

Soon after.

Terran Ye Xingchen is here.

Swish!

The eyes of the Fifth Realm of the Earthquake Sea Realm Lord and others looked at the peak powerhouses of the Fifth Realm who had arrived.

Very unfamiliar.

They hadn't seen it, it was supposed to be the Fifth Realm that rose during the Death Multidimensional Tribulation.

"Earthquake Sea Realm Lord, this is no longer the former site of your Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace, you can leave!"

Ye Xingchen said.

"I didn't expect that the human race still has a fifth realm, it seems that you are a new overlord-level force!"

The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord didn't panic at all, and didn't think that the mere human race could help himself.

If it weren't for the fact that he didn't know the information, he didn't dare to make a rash move, otherwise he would definitely destroy the human race.

Rumble!!!!

The majestic aura on Ye Tian's body erupted, and the hand of the Supreme Peerless Star of the Five Realms grabbed the Lord of the Earthquake Sea Realm.

"Not good!"

The face of the Zhenhai Realm Lord changed drastically, and he wanted to contend with Ye Xingchen, but he was severely injured by Ye Xingchen with just one blow.

This is still Ye Xingchen's weaker in other aspects, otherwise this blow can directly kill the Earthquake Sea Realm Lord.

"Let's get out of here!"

The Lord of the Earthquake Sea Realm confessed.

Ye Xingchen waved his hand and let the Zhenhai Realm Lord and them roll.

After the Zhenhai Realm Lord and them left, they found a few old friends who were still alive to inquire about the current situation.

Soon, they understood the situation and were dumbfounded.

They never expected that the human race would be the race of the Lord of the Ye Tian Realm, and Ye Tian (Mo Li's) actually killed the multi-dimensional life of the Sixth Realm, single-handedly fought against multiple Sixth Realm existences, and defeated the other party.

Moreover, the Terran race is now so powerful, with dozens of Fifth Realms.

I only stayed in the crystal barrier for more than a billion extradimensional eras, and after I came out, I directly changed the world.

Knowing the strength of the human race, they didn't dare to make a mistake, so they found a random place, and then began to rebuild the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace, and then cultivate their descendants and clansmen.

......

The new headquarters of the Terrans are more.

Ye Xingchen came back to report and told him about the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace.

"Those guys from the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace are back?"

Ye Tian smiled slightly, he was going to talk to the guy from the Zhenhai Realm Lord, although the other party's strength was not powerful, but after all, he had lived long enough and understood a lot of secrets, maybe he would understand the situation in the upper domain!

He still has to go to the upper domain in the future, so naturally he has to learn more about the information of the upper domain.
